# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

```yaml
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: service-a-server
  namespace: default
spec:
  routes:
  - match:
    - destination.port: "8080"
    - destination.serviceAccount: "service-b"
  listeners:
  - port: "8443"
    protocol: HTTP2

---

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: service-a-server-authz
  namespace: default
spec:
  routes:
  - match:
    - destination.port: "8080"
    - destination.serviceAccount: "service-b"

---

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: service-b-server
  namespace: default
spec:
  routes:
  - match:
    - destination.port: "8081"
    - destination.serviceAccount: "service-a"
  listeners:
  - port: "8443"
    protocol: HTTP2

---

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: service-b-server-authz
  namespace: default
spec:
  routes:
  - match:
    - destination.port: "8081"
    - destination.serviceAccount: "service-a"

---
